title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Find My Device map shows three disconnected devices for Voyager Free 60 Series but only two earbuds for Voyager Free 20, with no case shown
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure the Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey) device is paired but currently disconnected.
Navigate to the Find My Device feature from the Home screen or device settings.
Observe the map view showing disconnected devices.
Repeat steps 1-4 with a Voyager Free 20 (Tern) device paired but disconnected.
expected: For Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey): The map should show three disconnected devices: the case, left earbud, and right earbud. For Voyager Free 20 (Tern): The map should show two disconnected devices: the left earbud and right earbud (no case).
